side_compiler.note: Must use GOTOOLCHAIN=local to prevent toolchain directive override

optimization_backlog.name: bce-key-index-hot
optimization_backlog.desc: 21 bounds checks in key_index.go. generation.walk reverse-iteration pattern g.revs[l-i-1] not proved safe.

optimization_backlog.name: escape-keyindex-put
optimization_backlog.desc: keyIndex.put: append patterns escape to heap. GC at ~9% of CPU.

optimization_backlog.name: inline-btree-find-specialize
optimization_backlog.desc: items.find (cost 119) and node.get (cost 167) too complex for budget. Consider specialization or partial inlining of sort.Search pattern.

attempt_log.name: raise-inline-budget-85
attempt_log.detail: BTree.Get (cost 81) now inlinable but hot inner funcs (items.find cost 119, node.get cost 167) still too big. Only IndexCompact100 showed -1.28% (p=0.038), geomean -0.09%. Not meaningful.
attempt_log.lesson: Budget increase too small to reach truly hot inner functions. Need targeted approach (BCE, escape analysis) or partial inlining.

task_substitutions: Tasks 1,8 selected. Task 1 done (side compiler rebuilt, GOTOOLCHAIN=local needed). Advanced to Task 4 (inline budget 80->85) and Task 5 (benchmark). Result: no significant improvement.
